title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
snippet: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
snippet: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
